User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user within the CRM system, including their roles and basic profile information. This entity is distinct from authentication data, which is handled externally by Firebase Auth.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity. This typically corresponds to the Firebase Authentication UID.

email.description: The user's email address, often provided by the identity provider (e.g., Google).

displayName.description: The user's full name or preferred display name.

role.description: The role assigned to the user within the CRM (e.g., 'admin', 'manager', 'sales').

isActive.description: Indicates if the user is an active member of the project team.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user record was last updated.

Account.title: Account
Account.description: Represents a company or organization that is a client or prospect for the CRM.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Account entity.

name.description: The official name of the company or organization.

industry.description: The industry sector the account operates in.

website.description: The primary website URL for the account.

phone.description: The main contact phone number for the account.

address.description: The primary physical address of the account.

ownerId.description: Reference to the User who is the primary owner or manager of this account. (Relationship: User 1:N Account)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the account record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the account record was last updated.

Lead.title: Lead
Lead.description: Represents a potential customer or prospect that has not yet been qualified as an opportunity.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Lead entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the lead contact.

lastName.description: The last name of the lead contact.

email.description: The primary email address of the lead.

phone.description: The primary phone number of the lead.

status.description: The current status of the lead (e.g., 'New', 'Contacted', 'Qualified', 'Disqualified').

origin.description: The source from which the lead was acquired (e.g., 'Website', 'Referral', 'Event', 'Cold Call').

aiScore.description: An AI-generated score indicating the lead's potential or likelihood of conversion.

accountId.description: Reference to the Account associated with this lead. (Relationship: Account 1:N Lead)

ownerId.description: Reference to the User who is responsible for managing this lead. (Relationship: User 1:N Lead)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the lead record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the lead record was last updated.

Opportunity.title: Opportunity
Opportunity.description: Represents a qualified sales opportunity, tracking its progress through the sales pipeline.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Opportunity entity.

name.description: A descriptive name for the sales opportunity.

value.description: The estimated monetary value of the opportunity.

expectedCloseDate.description: The anticipated date by which the opportunity is expected to close.

pipelineStage.description: The current stage of the opportunity in the sales pipeline (e.g., 'Prospecting', 'Qualification', 'Proposal', 'Negotiation', 'Closed Won', 'Closed Lost').

summary.description: An AI-generated summary of the opportunity based on activity notes and details.

accountId.description: Reference to the Account associated with this opportunity. (Relationship: Account 1:N Opportunity)

ownerId.description: Reference to the User who is the primary owner or sales representative for this opportunity. (Relationship: User 1:N Opportunity)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the opportunity record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the opportunity record was last updated.

Activity.title: Activity
Activity.description: Records all interactions and tasks related to leads or opportunities.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Activity entity.

subject.description: A brief subject or title for the activity.

notes.description: Detailed notes or description of the interaction.

activityDate.description: The date and time when the activity occurred or is scheduled.

assignedToId.description: Reference to the User to whom this activity is assigned. (Relationship: User 1:N Activity)

leadId.description: Optional reference to the Lead if this activity is specifically associated with a lead. (Relationship: Lead 1:N Activity)

opportunityId.description: Optional reference to the Opportunity if this activity is specifically associated with an opportunity. (Relationship: Opportunity 1:N Activity)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the activity record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the activity record was last updated.

definition.description: Stores user profiles, roles, and active status. The `userId` corresponds to the Firebase Authentication UID.
Records all interactions and tasks related to leads or opportunities.
